research.hotel_reviews:
=== ohana tokyo house === OHANA TOKYO HOUSE About: If you do not have an address in Japan please send a photo of the page with your passport photo to my email address by the day before checkin.
The email address is ohana.tokyohousegmail.com.
#128578; Very clean and comfortable!" ⭐5 (Bluepillow.com) Sivarama: "Exceptional" ⭐5 (Bluepillow.com) Mohamad: "Exceptional" === villettina浅草 - one-bedroom apartment === Villettina浅草 - One-Bedroom Apartment About: Villettina浅草 offers accommodations in Tokyo, a 9-minute walk from Shofukuji Temple and 0.4 miles from Nitenmon Gate. There's a private entrance at the apartment for the convenience of those who stay. Rating: ⭐ 4.75/5 (8 reviews) Amenities: Air conditioning, Crib, Heating, Ironing board, Kitchen, Microwave, Oven stove, Smoke-free, Cable TV, Washer, Wheelchair accessible, Free Wi-Fi Nearby: Asakusa-Keisatsusho (Asakusa Police Station), ⑳ 浅草警察署前, Haneda Airport, Narita International Airport ⭐5 (Bluepillow.com) Arlan: "Exceptional
#128578; it was comfy
#128577; no elevator" ⭐4.5 (Bluepillow.com) Tuya: "Not bad
#128578; Location
#128577; Small" ⭐4.5 (Bluepillow.com) Giovanni: "Ottimo soggiorno
#128578; Appartamento molto carino e ben curato, in zona molto silenziosa.
#128577; Uniche pecche: la distanza di 10/15 minuti "
